title: Trimming Shop Mint Green Ribbon Roll - 50mm x 25 Metres - Double Sided Satin Brightly Coloured - 100% Polyester - for Gift Wrapping, Decorating, Arts and Craft - Machine Washable
features: 🎁[CRAFT RIBBON]: Our satin ribbon has a width of 50mm which is perfect for use in various craft & decoration projects. The elegant and versatile satin ribbon will look beautiful on any occasion
🎁[RIBBON LENGTH]: The double-sided ribbon roll comes with a total length of 25 metres of ribbon, which can be cut into smaller sizes as per the requirement

🎁[MATERIAL]: Our ribbons are made of 100% polyester material, which gives it a shiny appearance. Please note that due to the light and screen difference, the item's colour may be slightly different from the pictures, thanks for understanding

🎁[USED FOR]: Perfect for card making, clothing, crafts, decorations, Christmas and gift wrapping, florists, flowers and weddings, event decor, hair bows, woven headbands, scrapbooking and many other projects

🎁[AVAILABLE IN VIBRANT COLOURS]: Our ribbons come in various bright & chic colours including baby blue, bottle green, black, baby pink, burgundy, brown, champagne gold, canary, cream, dark silver, fluorescent orange, gold, green, hot pink, ivory, lilac purple, mint green, navy, orange, peach, purple, royal blue, red, rose pink, sky blue, silver, turquoise, white, yellow, pastel green, powder pink, scarlet, tangerine orange, blue vapour, classic green, lilac mist, shocking pink
description: Product Description Our ribbons can add elegant touches to your wedding from the bright and colourful, to the understated and opulent. Stationery and bouquets or chairs and cakes, you can decorate just about anything with these ribbons. These ribbons have a charm which transgresses age and gender, so you can also use these ribbons as a stylish fashion accessory to add some colorful cheer & glamour to your style. Satin ribbons are an incredibly versatile & colourful DIY supply that can be used in numerous ways for decorating, designing and much more. Our wide ribbon roll comes in a variety of colours and adapts the material to fit whatever product you're decorating. Our ribbons are perfect for use in gift wrapping, greeting cards, hangtags and invitations. They can also be used for hair braiding, flower bouquet, jewellery and accessorising. These ribbons can be cut into any length or narrowed in size as per your requirement.
